title: Kuressaare, Saare County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kuressaare, Saare County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kuressaare is a city in Saare County with a population of 13,000. The capital of Saaremaa island, a charming resort town with a stunning medieval bishop’s castle, a beautiful seaside promenade, and a peaceful island atmosphere.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
